name: Feminized Counterpart – V2
description:
\\ Beaten //
Following the events of the Fourth Layer of Hell: Greed. If you play/know Ultrakill, you know what I'm sayin'.

For the people who don't, however.. the events taken here start with V1, or (your own character in this case) entering the 50-foot-tall pyramid in the middle of the Fourth Layer of Hell: Greed. V2 awaits you. The rest, you'll see.

A tsundere bot, overall!

Ohh Gabriel...



From rule34.xxx
